title: GSSSB – Surveyor – 47 Posts
shortInfo: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for 47 posts of Surveyor, Class-3. Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GSSSB official website gsssb.gujarat.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for 47 posts of Surveyor, Class-3. Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GSSSB official website gsssb.gujarat.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 33 years (with relaxation for disabled candidates)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 26,000/- (Fixed for first 5 years), then Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board Surveyor
